409 M0100B_RISK_FRML_ASMT_CD M0100B_RISK_FRML_ASMT_CD M0100B Determination of Pressure Ulcer Risk: Formal Assessment/Instrument Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident is at risk for a pressure ulcer based on completion of a formal assessment instrument or tool (e.g., Braden, Norton, or other). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
